events.description: Beloved West Marin farmers market at the iconic Toby's Feed Barn. Local produce, artisan foods, and the quintessential Point Reyes experience. Runs until 2 PM.
events.notes: Seasonal: June–November only.
events.description_es: Amado mercado de agricultores del oeste de Marin en el icónico Toby's Feed Barn. Productos locales, alimentos artesanales y la experiencia quintaesencial de Point Reyes. Hasta las 2 PM.

events.address: 4th Street between A and Lootens, San Rafael, CA 94901
events.description: Monthly evening summer market on 4th Street in downtown San Rafael. Fresh produce, artisan foods, live music, and a festive community atmosphere. Runs until 9 PM.
events.notes: Monthly — 2nd Friday of the month. May–September 2026 dates: May 15, Jun 12, Jul 10, Aug 14, Sep 11.
events.description_es: Mercado de verano mensual por la noche en la Calle 4ta en el centro de San Rafael. Productos frescos, comida callejera, artesanos y entretenimiento en vivo. Hasta las 9 PM.

events.address: 4th Street between Lincoln and B Street, San Rafael, CA 94901
events.description: Summer evening market on 4th Street in downtown San Rafael with fresh produce, street food, artisans, and live entertainment. Runs until 9 PM.
events.notes: Seasonal: June–September only.
events.description_es: Mercado de verano los jueves por la noche en la Calle 4ta en el centro de San Rafael con productos frescos, comida callejera, artesanos y entretenimiento en vivo. Hasta las 9 PM.

events.address: Main St & Dillon Beach Rd, Tomales, CA 94971
events.description: Small community farmers market in the heart of West Marin. Local produce and artisan goods from the surrounding agricultural community.
events.notes: Seasonal: May–October. Small community market.
events.description_es: Pequeño mercado comunitario en el corazón del oeste de Marin con productos locales y artículos artesanales. Temporada: mayo a octubre.

events.event_name: Sing & Stompers at Sweetwater Music Hall
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: A special offsite Sing & Stomp performance at the legendary Sweetwater Music Hall! Musician Emily Bonn and her band the Sing & Stompers bring high-energy bluegrass music, playful movement, and lots of fun for all ages. Don't forget your dancing shoes! Stroller parking is extremely limited.
events.registration: Required — register at millvalleylibrary.libcal.com. 120 seats available.
events.notes: Stroller parking extremely limited — consider leaving stroller at home.
events.event_name_es: Sing & Stompers at Sweetwater Music Hall
events.description_es: ¡Una actuación especial de Sing & Stomp en el legendario Sweetwater Music Hall! La música de Emily Bonn y su banda traen música bluegrass llena de energía, movimiento juguetón y mucha diversión para todas las edades.

events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Local School of Rock students perform at the legendary Sweetwater Music Hall. A fun daytime show for the whole family — watch the next generation of rock stars take the stage!
events.notes: Doors 9:30 AM, Show 10 AM. Tickets required.
events.description_es: ¡Los estudiantes locales de School of Rock actúan en el legendario Sweetwater Music Hall! Un espectáculo divertido durante el día para toda la familia.

events.event_name: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Grateful Dead for Kids
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: The Rock and Roll Playhouse presents Music of the Grateful Dead for Kids — a family-friendly concert experience perfect for Father's Day Weekend. Dancing, singing, and fun for all ages. Grateful Dads Father's Day Weekend Bash!
events.notes: Doors 11 AM, Show 11:30 AM. Father's Day Weekend. Tickets required.
events.event_name_es: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Grateful Dead for Kids
events.description_es: El Rock and Roll Playhouse presenta Música del Grateful Dead para niños — una experiencia de concierto familiar perfecta para el Fin de Semana del Día del Padre.

events.venue: San Geronimo Valley Community Center — East Room
events.address: 6350 Sir Francis Drake Blvd, San Geronimo, CA 94963
events.description: A free, welcoming playgroup for caretakers and their little ones ages 0-5. A safe place to play, socialize, and connect with other families. Hosted by Playgroup Coordinator Perla de los Santos with lots of fun activities. The Marin County Free Library Learning Bus visits every other Tuesday from 10:30–11:15 AM.
events.notes: Runs until 12 PM. For more info email Perla at perladelossantos@parentservices.org. Learning Bus visits every other Tuesday 10:30–11:15 AM.
events.description_es: Un grupo de juego gratuito y acogedor para cuidadores y sus pequeños de 0 a 5 años los martes. Un lugar seguro para jugar, socializar y conectar con otras familias. El Autobús de Aprendizaje de la Biblioteca visita un martes sí y uno no.

events.venue: San Geronimo Valley Community Center — East Room
events.address: 6350 Sir Francis Drake Blvd, San Geronimo, CA 94963
events.description: A free, welcoming playgroup for caretakers and their little ones ages 0-5. A safe place to play, socialize, and connect with other families. Hosted by Playgroup Coordinator Perla de los Santos with lots of fun activities.
events.notes: Runs until 12 PM. For more info email Perla at perladelossantos@parentservices.org.
events.description_es: Un grupo de juego gratuito y acogedor para cuidadores y sus pequeños de 0 a 5 años los viernes. Un lugar seguro para jugar, socializar y conectar con otras familias.

events.description: Sing, dance, jump and play with musician Emily Bonn in this drop-in music and movement group. You are welcome to sit, but Emily's tunes will have you up and on your feet in no time! Ages 0-5.
events.notes: Outdoor on Town Plaza or Library Lawn. Moves to Council Chambers in inclement weather.
events.description_es: ¡Canta, baila, salta y juega con la música de Emily Bonn en este grupo de música y movimiento! Bienvenidos a sentarse, pero las melodías de Emily te harán levantarte a bailar. Para niños de 0 a 5 años.

events.address: 118 E. Strawberry Drive, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Free outdoor movie night under the stars at Strawberry Recreation District. Food vendor Benny's on site. Bring blankets and chairs. Register everyone in your household attending.
events.notes: Runs until 10 PM. Food vendor on site. Bring blankets and chairs. Registration required — free.
events.description_es: Noche de cine al aire libre bajo las estrellas en el Distrito Recreativo Strawberry. Proveedor de comida Benny's en el lugar. Trae cobijas y sillas. Registro requerido — gratis.

events.description: A special Hawaiian hula and musical performance at the Mill Valley Library. A wonderful cultural experience for the whole family. Free and open to all.
events.notes: Runs until 11:30 AM. Registration recommended.
events.description_es: Una actuación especial de hula hawaiano y música en la Biblioteca de Mill Valley. Una maravillosa experiencia cultural para toda la familia. Gratis y abierto a todos.

events.venue: Mill Valley Public Library — Creekside Room
events.description: Free screening of Pixar's Elio at the Mill Valley Library Creekside Room. Free popcorn provided!
events.notes: Already occurred April 10, 2026. Kept for reference — Mill Valley Library does periodic free movie screenings. Watch for future dates.
events.description_es: Proyección gratuita de Elio de Pixar en la Sala Creekside de la Biblioteca de Mill Valley. ¡Palomitas gratis incluidas!

events.address: 118 E. Strawberry Drive, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: 90s themed pool party at Strawberry Recreation District! Enjoy 90s music and family fun in the pool. Limited space — pre-registration required. Runs until 4 PM.
events.notes: Pre-registration required. Limited space. 90s themed — dress up encouraged!
events.description_es: ¡Fiesta en la piscina con tema de los años 90 en el Distrito Recreativo Strawberry! Disfruta música de los 90 y diversión familiar en la piscina. Espacio limitado — inscripción previa requerida.

events.address: 118 E. Strawberry Drive, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Annual community celebration — come eat, play, and shop! Free to attend. Food vendors, games, local vendors, and community fun for the whole family. Runs until 8 PM.
events.notes: Free to attend. Food vendors on site.
events.description_es: Celebración anual de la comunidad — ¡ven a comer, jugar y comprar! Proveedores de comida, juegos, vendedores locales y diversión comunitaria para toda la familia. Hasta las 8 PM.

events.event_name: Scary at the Berry — Halloween Event
events.address: 118 E. Strawberry Drive, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Strawberry Recreation District's annual Halloween family event! Costumes encouraged. Runs until 8 PM. Check website for ticket prices and activities.
events.notes: Registration required. Paid event — check website for ticket prices.
events.event_name_es: Scary at the Berry — Halloween Event
events.description_es: Evento anual de Halloween del Distrito Recreativo Strawberry. ¡Se anima a venir disfrazado! Hasta las 8 PM. Consulta el sitio web para precios de entradas y actividades.

events.address: 118 E. Strawberry Drive, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Annual Holiday Cheer event at Strawberry Recreation District. Drop in for holiday festivities and photos with Santa! Runs until 7:30 PM.
events.notes: Drop-in, free to attend.
events.description_es: Evento anual de Navidad en el Distrito Recreativo Strawberry. ¡Ven a celebrar las fiestas y tomarte fotos con Santa Claus! Hasta las 7:30 PM.

events.venue: Old Mill Park → Downtown Mill Valley
events.event_name: Mill Valley Memorial Day Parade & Pancake Breakfast
events.address: Old Mill Park, 375 Throckmorton Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Mill Valley's beloved annual Memorial Day celebration. Volunteer Firefighters Pancake Breakfast at City Hall 7–11 AM. Parade starts at Old Mill Park at 10:30 AM with floats, marching bands, dogs, clowns, and dancers winding through downtown Miller Ave.
events.notes: Pancake Breakfast 7–11 AM at City Hall. Parade 10:30 AM from Old Mill Park through downtown.
events.event_name_es: Mill Valley Memorial Day Parade & Pancake Breakfast
events.description_es: La amada celebración anual del Día de los Caídos en Mill Valley. Desayuno de panqueques de los Bomberos Voluntarios en el Ayuntamiento de 7 a 11 AM. El desfile comienza a las 10:30 AM desde el Parque Old Mill.

events.description: Family-focused summer street festival on Miller Avenue. Outdoor dining from local restaurants, kids crafts, bounce house, pop-up market with Mill Valley merchants, DJ, and community connection. Free and open to all.
events.notes: Approximately 500 families attend each night.
events.description_es: Festival de verano familiar en Miller Avenue. Restaurantes al aire libre, manualidades para niños, casa inflable, mercado pop-up con comercios de Mill Valley, DJ y conexión comunitaria. Gratis y abierto a todos.

events.description: Family-focused summer street festival on Miller Avenue. Outdoor dining from local restaurants, kids crafts, bounce house, pop-up market with Mill Valley merchants, DJ, and community connection. Free and open to all.
events.notes: Approximately 500 families attend each night.
events.description_es: Festival de verano familiar en Miller Avenue. Restaurantes al aire libre, manualidades para niños, casa inflable, mercado pop-up con comercios de Mill Valley, DJ y conexión comunitaria. Gratis y abierto a todos.

events.address: Mill Valley Downtown Plaza, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Annual Juneteenth Freedom Festival celebrating African American history and culture. Live entertainment, local food vendors, arts and crafts, interactive activities for kids, community vendors, and local organizations. Runs until 3 PM.
events.notes: Juneteenth commemorates June 19, 1865. Free and open to all.
events.description_es: Festival anual de Juneteenth que celebra la historia y cultura afroamericana. Entretenimiento en vivo, proveedores de comida local, manualidades, actividades interactivas para niños y organizaciones comunitarias. Hasta las 3 PM.

events.description: Annual family campout at the Mill Valley Community Center! Fee includes camping space, dinner and breakfast, family games and activities, campfire entertainment, and preparedness activities. Children 3 and under free.
events.notes: Children 3 & under free. Register at MyMVR.org. Date estimated — confirm at cityofmillvalley.gov.
events.description_es: Campamento familiar anual en el Centro Comunitario de Mill Valley. El precio incluye espacio de campamento, cena y desayuno, juegos y actividades familiares, entretenimiento alrededor de la fogata. Niños de 3 años o menos, gratis.

events.description: Monthly community celebration on the Sausalito waterfront. Live music, local art displays, family-friendly fun, sidewalk sales, restaurant specials, and a festive atmosphere exploring local shops and galleries. Encourages exploring Sausalito's creative character.
events.notes: Every 4th Saturday. 2026 dates: May 23, Jun 27, Jul 25, Aug 22, Sep 26, Oct 24, Nov 28, Dec 26.
events.description_es: Celebración comunitaria mensual en el paseo marítimo de Sausalito. Música en vivo, exhibiciones de arte local, diversión familiar, ventas en las aceras y precios especiales en restaurantes. ¡Explora el carácter creativo de Sausalito!

events.address: 10 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Marin's beloved annual county fair! Rides, live entertainment, farm animals, food, and Junior Division competitions for kids ages 5-18 including arts and crafts, photography, baking, and livestock. 2026 theme: Stars, Stripes & Stories. Entry deadline June 17.
events.registration: Not required for attending. Junior competition entry at marin.fairwire.com (small fee).
events.notes: July 1–5, 2026. Junior Division entry deadline June 17. Entry fees $2–$6 for competitions.
events.description_es: ¡La amada feria anual del condado de Marin! Atracciones, entretenimiento en vivo, animales de granja, comida y competencias de la División Junior para niños de 5 a 18 años. Tema 2026: Stars, Stripes & Stories.

events.address: Downtown Mill Valley Plaza, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Mill Valley's biggest annual holiday celebration with approximately 2,500 attendees! Electric train for kids, live holiday performances, festive activities, and community spirit. A beloved Mill Valley tradition.
events.notes: 32nd Annual Winterfest. Check enjoymillvalley.com for exact times closer to date.
events.description_es: La mayor celebración anual de fiestas de Mill Valley con aproximadamente 2,500 asistentes. Tren eléctrico para niños, actuaciones festivas en vivo y espíritu comunitario. Una tradición amada de Mill Valley.

events.description: Intimate and festive holiday gingerbread house decorating experience for families. Sold out in its debut season — register early! Hosted by the Mill Valley Chamber of Commerce.
events.notes: Sold out in debut season — register early. Venue and time TBD — check website closer to date.
events.description_es: Experiencia íntima y festiva de decoración de casas de pan de jengibre para familias. ¡Se agotó en su temporada de debut — inscríbete temprano! Organizado por la Cámara de Comercio de Mill Valley.

events.address: Bear Valley Visitor Center, 1 Bear Valley Rd, Point Reyes Station, CA 94956
events.description: Annual celebration of birds and wildlife at Point Reyes National Seashore. Guided birding walks, nature activities, wildlife presentations, and family-friendly programs all weekend. A wonderful introduction to West Marin's incredible biodiversity.
events.registration: Not required for most events — check pointreyesbirdingfestival.org
events.notes: Multi-day festival Fri–Sun. Various locations throughout Point Reyes. Some walks require registration.
events.description_es: Celebración anual de aves y vida silvestre en Point Reyes National Seashore. Caminatas guiadas de observación de aves, actividades de naturaleza, presentaciones sobre vida silvestre y programas familiares durante todo el fin de semana.

events.description: A day-long celebration at Slide Ranch's beautiful coastal farm. Animal encounters, live music, nature exploration, cooking demonstrations, and more. A magical family experience on the Marin coast. Runs until 3 PM.
events.notes: Annual spring event. Check slideranch.org for tickets and details.
events.description_es: Una celebración de un día en la hermosa granja costera de Slide Ranch. Encuentros con animales, música en vivo, exploración de la naturaleza, demostraciones de cocina y más. Una experiencia mágica familiar en la costa de Marin.

events.description: Free tours of historic tall ships at the Sausalito waterfront. Live entertainment, family activities, and a chance to explore beautiful sailing vessels. A wonderful maritime experience for kids and families. Runs until 2 PM.
events.notes: Annual spring event. Runs 10 AM–2 PM.
events.description_es: Tours gratuitos de barcos históricos en el paseo marítimo de Sausalito. Entretenimiento en vivo y actividades familiares. Una maravillosa experiencia marítima para niños y familias.

events.description: Family-friendly Earth Day festival at Tam Valley Community Center. Green activities, environmental exhibits, music, and community fun celebrating our planet. Runs until 3 PM.
events.notes: Annual Earth Day event. Runs 10 AM–3 PM.
events.description_es: Festival de Día de la Tierra familiar en el Centro Comunitario de Tam Valley. Actividades ecológicas, exhibiciones ambientales, música y diversión comunitaria celebrando nuestro planeta.

events.event_name: Earth Day Celebration with Rescued Animals
events.description: Spend the day with rescued farm animals at Rancho Compasion in Nicasio. Live music with Charity and the JAMBand, animal encounters, and Earth Day celebration. A truly special West Marin experience for families. Runs until 1 PM.
events.notes: Annual Earth Day event. Register in advance.
events.event_name_es: Earth Day Celebration with Rescued Animals
events.description_es: Pasa el día con animales rescatados en el santuario Rancho Compasión en Nicasio. Música en vivo con Charity y la JAMBand. Una experiencia especial del oeste de Marin para familias.

events.description: A family day at the Presidio Riding Club Stables in the Marin Headlands. Meet the horses, watch a roping demonstration at 11 AM, enjoy arts and crafts and a bake sale. A fun unique experience for horse-loving families. Runs until 1:30 PM.
events.notes: Annual spring event in the Marin Headlands.
events.description_es: Un día familiar en los establos del Presidio Riding Club en los Headlands de Marin. Conoce los caballos, mira una demostración de lazo a las 11 AM, disfruta manualidades y una venta de repostería.

events.description: Annual community carnival bringing together every school in San Rafael. Games, activities, food, and family fun celebrating all that is great about the community. Benefits HeadsUp educational programs for San Rafael students. Runs until 3 PM.
events.notes: Annual spring community event.
events.description_es: Carnaval comunitario anual que reúne a todas las escuelas de San Rafael. Juegos, actividades, comida y diversión familiar celebrando todo lo grandioso de la comunidad. Beneficia los programas educativos de HeadsUp.

events.event_name: Discovery Hike with WildCare Terwilliger Nature Guide
events.description: Immerse yourself in nature at Olompali with a discovery hike led by a WildCare Terwilliger Nature Guide. Learn about local wildlife, plants, and the natural history of this beautiful Marin park. Runs until noon.
events.notes: Part of the Elizabeth Terwilliger Nature Education legacy.
events.event_name_es: Discovery Hike with WildCare Terwilliger Nature Guide
events.description_es: Sumérgete en la naturaleza en Olompali con una caminata de descubrimiento dirigida por un Guía de Naturaleza Terwilliger de WildCare. Aprende sobre la vida silvestre local, plantas e historia natural de este hermoso parque de Marin.

events.venue: Osher Marin JCC — Outdoor Tot Pool
events.address: 200 N. San Pedro Road, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Monthly drop-in pool party in the JCC's outdoor warm-water toddler pool — just one foot deep and perfect for little ones. Includes age-appropriate pool toys, tunes, towels, and a bounce house. Family lane open in the big pool for older siblings. Bring a picnic dinner! Members free. Non-members $15 for one-child family, $20 for two or more children.
events.registration: Not required — pay at the door
events.notes: Seasonal May–October only. Monthly — check marinjcc.org for specific Friday dates each month. Members free.
events.description_es: Fiesta mensual en la piscina en la cálida piscina para niños pequeños del JCC — solo un pie de profundidad, perfecta para los más pequeños. Incluye juguetes de piscina apropiados para la edad, música, toallas y una casa inflable. Carril familiar abierto en la piscina grande para hermanos mayores. ¡Trae una cena de picnic! Miembros gratis. No miembros $15 para un hijo, $20 para dos o más hijos.

events.event_name_es: Grupo de Juego Virtual de Lenguaje de Señas para Bebés
events.description: Join Teacher Bill White from Happy Baby Signs for a free monthly Baby Sign Language Virtual Playgroup on Zoom! A fun, engaging American Sign Language session for babies, toddlers, and their parents and caregivers. Includes resources and ideas you can use at home. All languages welcome. Drop-ins always welcome — no commitment required.
events.description_es: ¡Únete a Teacher Bill White de Happy Baby Signs para un grupo de juego virtual gratuito de lenguaje de señas para bebés en Zoom! Una sesión divertida y atractiva de Lenguaje Americano de Señas para bebés, niños pequeños y sus padres y cuidadores. Incluye recursos e ideas que puedes usar en casa. Todos los idiomas son bienvenidos. ¡Las visitas sin cita previa siempre son bienvenidas!
events.notes: Last Tuesday of each month. Runs until 11:30 AM. Virtual via Zoom — link provided after Eventbrite registration. All languages welcome.

events.venue: Nike Missile Site SF-88L, Marin Headlands
events.event_name_es: Jornada de Puertas Abiertas del Sitio Nike
events.address: Field Road, Marin Headlands, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: Tour the Cold War-era Nike Missile Site in the Marin Headlands with veterans who served there. Kids can explore the underground missile storage area, launcher, and control buildings. A fascinating piece of local Cold War history right in our backyard. Free. Runs until 3 PM.
events.description_es: Visita el sitio de misiles Nike de la Guerra Fría en los Marin Headlands con veteranos que sirvieron allí. Los niños pueden explorar el área de almacenamiento subterráneo, el lanzador y los edificios de control. Historia fascinante de la Guerra Fría. Gratis. Hasta las 3 PM.
events.notes: Monthly — first Saturday. Free. Runs noon–3 PM.

events.organization: Friends of China Camp / AAPI Community
events.event_name_es: Celebración del Mes del Patrimonio AAPI
events.address: China Camp State Park, 100 China Camp Village, San Rafael, CA 94901
events.description: Celebrate Asian American Pacific Islander heritage at China Camp State Park in San Rafael. Community celebration with activities, cultural programs, and family fun in a beautiful historic setting. Runs until 2 PM. Park parking fee may apply.
events.description_es: Celebra el patrimonio asiático americano e isleño del Pacífico en el Parque Estatal China Camp en San Rafael. Celebración comunitaria con actividades, programas culturales y diversión familiar en un hermoso entorno histórico. Hasta las 2 PM.
events.notes: Runs 11 AM–2 PM. Free. Park parking fee may apply.

events.venue: Battery Townsley, Fort Cronkhite, Marin Headlands
events.event_name_es: Jornada de Puertas Abiertas de Battery Townsley
events.address: Fort Cronkhite, Marin Headlands, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: Explore the World War II-era Battery Townsley in the Marin Headlands at its monthly open house. Kids can explore the tunnels, gun batteries, and learn about WWII coastal defense. A fascinating free adventure right in Marin. Runs until 4 PM.
events.description_es: Explora la Battery Townsley de la época de la Segunda Guerra Mundial en los Marin Headlands. Los niños pueden explorar los túneles y las baterías de artillería. Una aventura gratuita fascinante en Marin. Hasta las 4 PM.
events.notes: Monthly — first Sunday. Free. Runs noon–4 PM.

events.event_name_es: Caminata con Guardabosques en Baltimore Canyon
events.address: Baltimore Canyon Open Space Preserve, Larkspur, CA 94939
events.description: Join Marin County rangers to discover the history and wildlife of beautiful Baltimore Canyon Preserve in Larkspur — a stunning redwood canyon with a seasonal waterfall. Family-friendly ranger-guided walk. Runs until 11 AM. Free.
events.description_es: Únete a los guardabosques del Condado de Marin para descubrir la historia y la vida silvestre del hermoso Baltimore Canyon en Larkspur — un impresionante cañón de secuoyas con una cascada de temporada. Caminata guiada familiar. Hasta las 11 AM. Gratis.
events.notes: Runs 9–11 AM. Free. Register at parks.marincounty.gov.

events.address: 171 Bel Marin Keys Blvd, Novato, CA 94949
events.description: The Bay Area's grooviest dog lover's event! Bring the kids and the dogs for live music, food, vendors, activities, and community fun at Marin Humane. A beloved annual Marin event celebrating our furry friends. Runs until 5 PM.
events.description_es: ¡El evento más genial para amantes de perros en el Bay Area! Trae a los niños y los perros para música en vivo, comida, vendedores, actividades y diversión comunitaria en Marin Humane. Un evento anual muy querido. Hasta las 5 PM.
events.notes: Runs noon–5 PM. Tickets required — check eventbrite.

events.venue: Various artist studios across Marin County
events.description: The 32nd annual Marin Open Studios — experience the work of Marin's vibrant artistic community as artists open their studios to the public all weekend. Free to attend. A wonderful family outing to discover local art and artists across Marin. Runs until 6 PM both days.
events.description_es: La 32ª edición anual de Estudios Abiertos de Marin — experimenta el trabajo de la vibrante comunidad artística de Marin mientras los artistas abren sus estudios al público durante todo el fin de semana. Gratis. Hasta las 6 PM ambos días.
events.notes: Sat May 2 & Sun May 3, 11 AM–6 PM. Free. Check marinopenstudios.org for studio map.

events.event_name: Céili on the Lake — Irish Dance, Music & Culture
events.event_name_es: Céili en el Lago — Danza, Música y Cultura Irlandesa
events.address: Marin Civic Center Lagoon Park, 3501 Civic Center Dr, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Experience Irish dance, music, food, drink, and more at the Marin Civic Center Lagoon Park. A free outdoor festival for the whole family celebrating Irish culture. Runs until 6 PM both Saturday and Sunday.
events.description_es: Disfruta de danza irlandesa, música, comida, bebida y más en el Parque del Lago del Centro Cívico de Marin. Un festival gratuito al aire libre para toda la familia. Hasta las 6 PM el sábado y domingo.
events.notes: Sat May 2 & Sun May 3, 10 AM–6 PM. Free.

events.address: Marin County Fairgrounds, 10 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Join the Marin Greek Festival for its annual celebration of Greek culture with authentic food, live music, traditional dancing, and community fun. Memorial Day weekend at the Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church in Novato.
events.description_es: Únete al Festival Griego de Marin para su celebración anual de la cultura griega con comida auténtica, música en vivo, danza tradicional y diversión comunitaria. Fin de semana del Día de los Caídos en la Iglesia Ortodoxa Griega de la Natividad de Cristo en Novato.
events.notes: Memorial Day Weekend — Fri May 23 through Sun May 25. Check maringreekfestival.com for hours and ticket prices.

events.description: Learn about the wildflowers of Marin while crafting a Mother's Day corsage or small vase arrangement. Best for ages 6 to 12, all welcome. Sign-up required.
events.notes: Free Marin County Parks event at McNears Beach.
events.event_name_es: Taller de Flores del Día de la Madre
events.description_es: Aprende sobre las flores silvestres de Marin mientras creas un corsage o un pequeño arreglo floral para el Día de la Madre. Ideal para edades de 6 a 12 años, todos bienvenidos. Se requiere inscripción.

events.event_name: Mother's Day Pancake Breakfast at West Point Inn
events.address: 100 Old Railroad Grade Fire Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Hike to the historic West Point Inn on Mt. Tam for a Mother's Day pancake breakfast with stunning views. $15 adults, $15 kids; other options available.
events.notes: Hike-in event. Iconic Marin tradition.
events.event_name_es: Desayuno de Panqueques del Día de la Madre en West Point Inn
events.description_es: Camina hasta el histórico West Point Inn en Mt. Tam para disfrutar de un desayuno de panqueques con vistas espectaculares. $15 adultos, $15 niños; otras opciones disponibles.

events.description: Sunset sail aboard the Angel Island ferry with views of San Francisco Bay. Bring your own picnic dinner; tables and chairs provided inside and outside. Boarding at 6:10 PM.

events.description: Reading to a dog is fun and helps build confidence! Join us select Saturday's in the children's room. For kids ages 5 and up. Thanks to Marin Humane Society Share-a-Book dogs. No sign-up neccessary.
events.description_es: Leer a un perro es divertido y ayuda a ganar confianza. Únete a nosotros en la sala infantil. Para niños de 5 años en adelante. Gracias a los perros Share-a-Book de Marin Humane Society. No es necesario registrarse.

events.event_name: Saturdays at the Library: Crafts and Play
events.description: Drop-in Saturday morning program at the Bolinas Library with crafts and free play for families. All ages welcome.
events.notes: West Marin — Bolinas Library.
events.event_name_es: Sábados en la Biblioteca: Manualidades y Juego
events.description_es: Programa de entrada libre los sábados por la mañana en la Biblioteca de Bolinas con manualidades y juego libre para familias. Todas las edades bienvenidas.

events.description: LEGO Club at the Bolinas Library — build, create, and connect with other LEGO fans. All ages welcome. Drop in, no registration required.
events.notes: West Marin — Bolinas Library.
events.event_name_es: Club de LEGO — Biblioteca de Bolinas
events.description_es: Club de LEGO en la Biblioteca de Bolinas — construye, crea y conéctate con otros fanáticos del LEGO. Todas las edades bienvenidas. Entrada libre, sin registro necesario.

events.event_name: Read to a Dog — Belvedere-Tiburon Library
events.description: Young readers practice reading aloud to a friendly volunteer therapy dog every Wednesday. A low-pressure, confidence-building experience for kids ages 5 and up. No sign-up necessary — just drop in.
events.notes: Weekly. Ages 5+. Drop-in.
events.event_name_es: Lee a un Perro — Biblioteca de Belvedere-Tiburon
events.description_es: Los jóvenes lectores practican leyendo en voz alta a un amable perro terapeuta voluntario todos los miércoles. Una experiencia de bajo estrés que desarrolla la confianza en niños de 5 años en adelante. Sin inscripción — solo pasa.

events.description: Every Wednesday afternoon, kids in Grades 3–5 tackle an exciting new craft challenge on the library's Main Patio. Each session features a different craft — all materials supplied. Drop in, no registration required.
events.notes: Weekly. Grades 3-5. Outdoor Main Patio.
events.description_es: Todos los miércoles por la tarde, los niños de los grados 3 a 5 enfrentan un emocionante nuevo desafío de manualidades en el patio principal de la biblioteca. Cada sesión tiene una manualidad diferente — todos los materiales son provistos. Entrada libre.

events.description: Kids ages 8–11 visit the library every Wednesday to play board games and make friends. A variety of games provided. Drop in — no registration required.
events.notes: Weekly. Ages 8-11. Board games provided.
events.event_name_es: Día de Juegos — Biblioteca de Belvedere-Tiburon
events.description_es: Los niños de 8 a 11 años visitan la biblioteca todos los miércoles para jugar juegos de mesa y hacer amigos. Se proveen varios juegos. Entrada libre — sin registro.

events.description: Every Monday, chalk is set out on the Children's Room patio for open, creative sidewalk chalk drawing. Drop in anytime during library hours and let the creativity flow.
events.notes: Weekly Monday. Open patio — drop in during library hours.
events.event_name_es: Lunes de Mosaico — Tiza en la Acera
events.description_es: Todos los lunes se colocan tizas en el patio de la sala infantil para dibujar libremente en la acera. Entra en cualquier momento durante el horario de la biblioteca y deja fluir la creatividad.

events.description: Fun and interactive Sunday morning of music, movement, and stories for young children and their families. A great way to start the week with singing, dancing, and storytime.
events.notes: Weekly Sunday. Ages 0-5.
events.description_es: Una mañana dominical divertida e interactiva de música, movimiento e historias para niños pequeños y sus familias. Una gran manera de comenzar la semana con canciones, baile y cuentos.

events.event_name: Cuentos con Ritmo with Colors of Spanish
events.description: Bilingual music and movement program for young children from Colors of Spanish. Engaging songs, rhymes, and movement in Spanish and English — welcoming for any level of Spanish experience.
events.notes: New Larkspur Library location on Rose Lane.
events.event_name_es: Cuentos con Ritmo con Colors of Spanish
events.description_es: Programa bilingüe de música y movimiento para niños pequeños de Colors of Spanish. Canciones, rimas y movimiento en español e inglés — bienvenidos todos los niveles de experiencia en español.

events.description: A fun, interactive, and high-energy drumming and percussion program designed for kids and families at the Larkspur Library. Get ready to bang some drums and move to the beat!
events.notes: New Larkspur Library location on Rose Lane.
events.event_name_es: ¡Todo el Mundo Toca el Tambor! — Biblioteca de Larkspur
events.description_es: Un programa de percusión y tambores divertido, interactivo y lleno de energía para niños y familias en la Biblioteca de Larkspur. ¡Prepárate para tocar tambores y moverte al ritmo!

events.event_name: Puppet Art Theater: Tommy's Pirate Adventure
events.description: Join Puppet Art Theater for 'Tommy's Pirate Adventure' — a live puppet show for kids and families at the Larkspur Library. A swashbuckling adventure full of fun and surprises!
events.notes: New Larkspur Library location on Rose Lane.
events.event_name_es: Teatro de Títeres: La Aventura Pirata de Tommy
events.description_es: Únete al Puppet Art Theater para 'La Aventura Pirata de Tommy' — una obra de títeres en vivo para niños y familias en la Biblioteca de Larkspur. ¡Una aventura de piratas llena de diversión y sorpresas!

events.event_name: Cuentos con Ritmo with Colors of Spanish
events.description: Bilingual music and movement program for young children from Colors of Spanish. Engaging songs, rhymes, and movement in Spanish and English — welcoming for any level of Spanish experience.
events.notes: New Larkspur Library location on Rose Lane.
events.event_name_es: Cuentos con Ritmo con Colors of Spanish
events.description_es: Programa bilingüe de música y movimiento para niños pequeños de Colors of Spanish. Canciones, rimas y movimiento en español e inglés — bienvenidos todos los niveles de experiencia en español.

events.description: Annual community festival at Bon Air Center in Larkspur. Family-friendly with community vendors, activities, and fun for all ages. Hosted with the Friends of Larkspur Library.
events.notes: Annual May event.
events.description_es: Festival comunitario anual en el Centro Bon Air en Larkspur. Familiar con vendedores comunitarios, actividades y diversión para todas las edades. Organizado con los Amigos de la Biblioteca de Larkspur.

events.organization: City of Larkspur / City of Corte Madera
events.event_name: Corte Madera / Larkspur 4th of July Parade & Festival
events.description: Annual 4th of July Parade and Festival through downtown Corte Madera and Larkspur. A beloved Marin community tradition with floats, marching bands, and family fun for all ages.
events.notes: Confirm exact time at ci.larkspur.ca.us closer to July 4.
events.event_name_es: Desfile y Festival del 4 de Julio de Corte Madera / Larkspur
events.description_es: Desfile y festival anual del 4 de julio por el centro de Corte Madera y Larkspur. Una querida tradición comunitaria de Marin con carrozas, bandas de música y diversión familiar para todas las edades.

events.venue: The Redwoods Senior Living Center — Auditorium
events.event_name: Oldies Music at The Redwoods Senior Living Center
events.description: Croon along with the residents of The Redwoods Senior Living Center to tunes from the '60s and '70s sung by a live band. A warm, intergenerational community experience held every Wednesday in the Auditorium. All ages welcome.
events.notes: Located in the Auditorium. Every Wednesday year-round.
events.event_name_es: Música Oldies en The Redwoods Senior Living Center
events.description_es: Canta junto a los residentes de The Redwoods Senior Living Center con canciones de los años 60 y 70 interpretadas por una banda en vivo. Una cálida experiencia comunitaria intergeneracional todos los miércoles en el Auditorio. Todas las edades bienvenidas.

events.event_name: Youth in Arts C Street Celebration
events.description: Youth in Arts hosts the C Street Celebration with live performances, hands-on activities, art-making workshops, and community fun in downtown San Rafael. Free and family-friendly.
events.notes: Annual event. Downtown San Rafael.
events.event_name_es: Celebración de la Calle C de Youth in Arts
events.description_es: Youth in Arts presenta la Celebración de la Calle C con actuaciones en vivo, actividades prácticas, talleres de arte y diversión comunitaria en el centro de San Rafael. Gratis y para toda la familia.

events.event_name: Water Safety Skills at McNears Beach Park
events.description: Learn essential water safety skills in a fun, hands-on session at McNears Beach Park in San Rafael. Great for kids and families heading into summer swim season.
events.notes: McNears Beach Park. Marin County Parks.
events.event_name_es: Habilidades de Seguridad Acuática en McNears Beach Park
events.description_es: Aprende habilidades esenciales de seguridad acuática en una sesión práctica y divertida en McNears Beach Park en San Rafael. Ideal para niños y familias que se preparan para el verano.

events.event_name: Walk for Moms — Lagoon Park, San Rafael
events.address: 10 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Community walk to support, celebrate, and raise vital awareness for maternal mental health. A day of community solidarity and family-friendly fun at Lagoon Park (Marin Center) in San Rafael.
events.notes: Mother's Day weekend. Lagoon Park.
events.event_name_es: Caminata por las Mamás — Lagoon Park, San Rafael
events.description_es: Caminata comunitaria para apoyar y celebrar la salud mental materna. Un día de solidaridad comunitaria y diversión familiar en Lagoon Park (Marin Center) en San Rafael.

events.event_name: Marine Science Sunday — Marine Mammal Center
events.description: Special Marine Science Sunday at the Marine Mammal Center featuring talks and demonstrations on saving species. Two sessions: noon and 2pm. Free and open to all ages.
events.notes: Two sessions: noon and 2pm.
events.event_name_es: Domingo de Ciencias Marinas — Centro de Mamíferos Marinos
events.description_es: Domingo especial de Ciencias Marinas en el Marine Mammal Center con charlas y demostraciones sobre la conservación de especies. Dos sesiones: mediodía y 2pm. Gratis para todas las edades.

events.organization: Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church
events.venue: Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church
events.description: The annual Marin Greek Festival celebrates Greek culture with authentic food, live music, traditional dancing, and community fun. Memorial Day weekend at the Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church in Novato.
events.notes: May 22–24. Annual tradition since 1972.
events.description_es: El Festival Griego de Marin celebra la cultura griega con comida auténtica, música en vivo, danza tradicional y diversión comunitaria. Fin de semana del Día de los Caídos en la Iglesia Ortodoxa Griega en Novato.

events.venue: Mill Valley Recreation Center — Friends Field
events.event_name: Kiddo! Day on the Green — Memorial Day Carnival
events.description: The Kiddo! Memorial Day Weekend Carnival — a beloved Marin tradition for over 20 years at the Mill Valley Recreation Center Friends Field. Rides, games, food, and family fun for all ages over the long weekend.
events.notes: May 23–26. Annual 20+ year Mill Valley tradition.
events.event_name_es: Kiddo! Día en el Prado — Carnaval de Memorial Day
events.description_es: El Carnaval de Memorial Day de Kiddo! — una querida tradición de Marin durante más de 20 años en el campo Friends del Centro Recreativo de Mill Valley. Juegos mecánicos, juegos, comida y diversión familiar.

events.address: 2704 Muir Woods Road, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: A beloved Marin Memorial Day weekend tradition at Santos Meadows — the Muir Beach Volunteer Firefighters' Barbecue with delicious food, live music, craft beers, wine, and family fun while supporting the local fire department.
events.notes: Annual fundraiser. Santos Meadows on Frank Valley Road.
events.event_name_es: Barbacoa de los Bomberos Voluntarios de Muir Beach
events.description_es: Una querida tradición del fin de semana del Día de los Caídos en Santos Meadows — la barbacoa de los Bomberos Voluntarios de Muir Beach con comida deliciosa, música en vivo, cervezas artesanales, vino y diversión familiar.

events.event_name: Memorial Day Services — Marin Veterans' Memorial
events.address: 20 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: The Marin County Memorial Day observance conducted by Marin County United Veterans Council. Features music, a remembrance program, flag displays, and wreath-laying ceremonies honoring those who served.
events.notes: Annual civic ceremony. Confirm time at marincounty.gov.
events.event_name_es: Servicios del Día de los Caídos — Auditorio Memorial de Veteranos de Marin
events.description_es: La conmemoración del Día de los Caídos del Condado de Marin con música, programa de remembranza, exhibición de banderas y ceremonias de ofrenda floral en honor a quienes sirvieron.

events.event_name: BBQ on the Lawn — Rancho Nicasio (Memorial Day Weekend)
events.description: Celebrate Memorial Day at Rancho Nicasio with a BBQ on the Lawn featuring live music by Pablo Cruise. Family-friendly outdoor event in the heart of West Marin.
events.notes: May 25–27. Rancho Nicasio is a great West Marin family venue.
events.event_name_es: BBQ en el Césped — Rancho Nicasio (Fin de Semana del Día de los Caídos)
events.description_es: Celebra el Día de los Caídos en Rancho Nicasio con una barbacoa en el césped con música en vivo de Pablo Cruise. Evento familiar al aire libre en el corazón del oeste de Marin.

events.venue: Schooner Freda B — Sausalito Yacht Harbor
events.description: Afternoon sail on San Francisco Bay aboard the historic Schooner Freda B on Memorial Day, enjoying iconic Bay views from the water. All ages welcome.
events.notes: Confirm time and tickets at website.
events.event_name_es: Navegación al Atardecer del Día de los Caídos — Sausalito
events.description_es: Navegación vespertina por la Bahía de San Francisco a bordo de la histórica Goleta Freda B en el Día de los Caídos, disfrutando de las vistas icónicas de la bahía desde el agua.

events.event_name: MALT Guided Hike at Corda Family Ranch (May 15)
events.description: Guided hike at Corda Family Ranch, a MALT-protected landscape along Novato Boulevard. Experience an iconic Marin County agricultural landscape. Registration required.
events.notes: Registration required. Confirm time at malt.org.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Guiada de MALT en el Rancho Familiar Corda (15 de mayo)
events.description_es: Caminata guiada en el Rancho Familiar Corda, un paisaje protegido por MALT a lo largo del Bulevar de Novato. Se requiere registro.

events.event_name: MALT Guided Hike at Corda Family Ranch (May 16)
events.description: Guided hike at Corda Family Ranch, a MALT-protected landscape along Novato Boulevard. Experience an iconic Marin County agricultural landscape. Registration required.
events.notes: Registration required. Confirm time at malt.org.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Guiada de MALT en el Rancho Familiar Corda (16 de mayo)
events.description_es: Caminata guiada en el Rancho Familiar Corda, un paisaje protegido por MALT a lo largo del Bulevar de Novato. Se requiere registro.

events.organization: US Coast Guard Sector San Francisco
events.event_name: US Coast Guard Water Safety Fair
events.description: Learn to keep safe in and around the water and see live rescue demonstrations with the US Coast Guard. Free, family-friendly event at the Sausalito waterfront.
events.notes: Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 weekend post.
events.event_name_es: Feria de Seguridad Acuática de la Guardia Costera de EE.UU.
events.description_es: Aprende a mantenerte seguro en el agua y cerca de ella y observa demostraciones en vivo de rescate con la Guardia Costera de EE.UU. Evento gratuito para toda la familia en el paseo marítimo de Sausalito.

events.organization: Goodman Building Supply — Goodie's Kids' Club
events.event_name: Goodie's Kids' Club Mother's Day Workshop
events.address: Goodman Building Supply, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Come make a handmade handprint keepsake for Mother's Day at Goodie's Kids' Club at Goodman Building Supply in Mill Valley. RSVP by Friday May 8 recommended.
events.notes: May 2026 one-off instance. Recurring monthly version added as ID 208. See goodmanbuildingsupply.net/goodies-kids-club for future dates.
events.event_name_es: Taller del Día de la Madre de Goodie's Kids' Club
events.description_es: Ven a hacer un recuerdo de huella de mano para el Día de la Madre en Goodie's Kids' Club en Goodman Building Supply en Mill Valley. Se recomienda RSVP antes del viernes 8 de mayo.

events.event_name: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Music of Talking Heads + More for Kids
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: The Rock and Roll Playhouse brings the music of Talking Heads and more to kids at Sweetwater Music Hall in Mill Valley. A fun, energetic family concert experience.
events.notes: Mother's Day Sunday. Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 weekend post.
events.event_name_es: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Música de Talking Heads y Más para Niños
events.description_es: The Rock and Roll Playhouse trae la música de Talking Heads y más para niños en Sweetwater Music Hall en Mill Valley. Un concierto familiar divertido y lleno de energía.

events.event_name: Owl Hike at Tennessee Valley — Mill Valley
events.address: Tennessee Valley Trailhead, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Go on an evening hike in search of owls at Tennessee Valley in Mill Valley. Registration required. A magical family outdoor experience as the sun goes down.
events.notes: Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 post. Registration required.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Nocturna en Busca de Búhos en Tennessee Valley
events.description_es: Sal a una caminata nocturna en busca de búhos en Tennessee Valley en Mill Valley. Se requiere registro. Una mágica experiencia familiar al aire libre al caer el sol.

events.event_name: May Madness — Classic Cars and Entertainment
events.description: May Madness brings classic cars and entertainment to downtown San Rafael. A festive family-friendly community event with vehicles on display, music, and activities.
events.notes: Annual event. Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 post.
events.event_name_es: May Madness — Autos Clásicos y Entretenimiento
events.description_es: May Madness trae autos clásicos y entretenimiento al centro de San Rafael. Un festivo evento comunitario familiar con vehículos en exhibición, música y actividades.

events.event_name: Afternoon of Art and Stories — Sausalito Library
events.description: Join Sausalito Library for an afternoon of art and stories for kids and families. A creative, relaxed Saturday afternoon program.
events.notes: Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 post.
events.event_name_es: Tarde de Arte e Historias — Biblioteca de Sausalito
events.description_es: Únete a la Biblioteca de Sausalito para una tarde de arte e historias para niños y familias. Un programa creativo y relajado para el sábado por la tarde.

events.event_name: Sip and Stroll — Downtown San Anselmo
events.description: Sip and stroll your way through downtown San Anselmo — a fun family-friendly afternoon exploring local shops, food, and the charming downtown streets.
events.notes: Source: Marin Mommies May 8-10 post.
events.event_name_es: Paseo con Bebidas — Centro de San Anselmo
events.description_es: Pasea por el centro de San Anselmo — una divertida tarde familiar explorando tiendas locales, comida y las encantadoras calles del centro.

events.event_name: Goodie's Kids' Club Workshop — Goodman Building Supply
events.description: Monthly kids' workshop at Goodman Building Supply where young DIY'ers aged 12 and under build creative arts and crafts projects — from birdhouses to stepping stones to holiday ornaments. Each project is free to attend and yours to take home. RSVP recommended to guarantee supplies.
events.registration: RSVP recommended — check goodmanbuildingsupply.net/goodies-kids-club for each month's project and registration form
events.notes: Monthly Saturday workshop. Specific date and project theme vary each month — check website for upcoming date. RSVP by the Friday before.
events.event_name_es: Taller del Club de Niños de Goodie — Goodman Building Supply
events.description_es: Taller mensual para niños en Goodman Building Supply donde los pequeños artesanos de 12 años o menos construyen proyectos creativos de artes y manualidades — desde casitas para pájaros hasta piedras de jardín y ornamentos navideños. Cada proyecto es gratuito y se llevan a casa. Se recomienda RSVP para garantizar los materiales.
